{{Infobox character
| name = Captain (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Captain is said to be [[Soulbound]] to his ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Captain's mind is Elder-touched.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Captain intends to head for the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The Captain intends to head for the Capital, ma’am.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
